title: Comprehensive mobile-first optimization with error handling and performance improvements

requirements.summary: Add mobile-optimized viewport meta tags to ensure proper scaling and touch interactions
acceptanceCriteria: Viewport meta tag includes width=device-width and initial-scale=1
User can zoom up to 5x on mobile devices
Viewport covers safe areas on notched devices

file_operations.description: Add or update viewport meta tag with mobile-optimized attributes: width=device-width, initial-scale=1, maximum-scale=5, user-scalable=yes, viewport-fit=cover

requirements.summary: Increase minimum touch target sizes to 44x44px for all interactive elements using responsive utilities
acceptanceCriteria: All buttons and interactive elements are minimum 44x44px on mobile
Adequate spacing exists between adjacent interactive elements
Touch targets are visually clear and accessible

file_operations.description: Add mobile-specific utility classes for touch targets ensuring minimum 44x44px size on mobile viewports, using Tailwind responsive utilities and CSS media queries
Apply mobile touch target classes to all interactive elements (buttons, links) ensuring 44x44px minimum size and adequate spacing
Apply mobile touch target classes to navigation buttons ensuring 44x44px minimum size and adequate spacing between items
Apply mobile touch target classes to play/pause button, favorite button, and other interactive controls ensuring 44x44px minimum size
Apply mobile touch target classes to playback controls and volume slider ensuring 44x44px minimum size on mobile viewports

requirements.summary: Implement mobile-specific error boundary component wrapping the entire application with detailed error recovery UI
acceptanceCriteria: Error boundary catches all React errors during rendering
Error UI displays readable error messages on small screens
Users can reload the app or clear storage from the error screen
Error details include component stack trace

file_operations.description: Enhance existing error boundary with mobile-optimized error display UI including component stack traces, recovery suggestions, and reload/clear storage buttons styled for small screens
Wrap the entire application router with the enhanced ErrorBoundary component to catch all React rendering errors

requirements.summary: Add comprehensive console logging throughout initialization sequence with timestamps and status tracking
acceptanceCriteria: Each initialization step logs to console with timestamp
Success and failure states are clearly logged
Logs persist and are viewable in mobile browser dev tools
Critical errors are logged with full stack traces

file_operations.description: Add comprehensive console logging at each initialization step: DOM ready, React mounting, QueryClient creation, InternetIdentityProvider initialization, and App component render, with timestamps and success/failure status. Note: This file is marked immutable in constraints, so implement logging in a way that preserves existing structure.

requirements.summary: Implement network connectivity check before canister calls with offline UI and automatic reconnection
acceptanceCriteria: App checks network connectivity status on mount
Offline state displays clear message to user
Users can manually retry connection
App automatically detects when connection is restored

file_operations.description: Add network connectivity check on mount using navigator.onLine and online/offline event listeners, displaying user-friendly offline message with retry button when network is unavailable, and automatically detecting reconnection
Create mobile-optimized component displaying offline status banner with retry button and automatic dismissal on reconnection

requirements.summary: Add timeout handlers (30 second maximum) to all React Query queries and mutations with actionable error messages
acceptanceCriteria: All queries timeout after 30 seconds maximum
Timeout errors display user-friendly messages
Users receive guidance on how to resolve timeout issues
Timeout errors trigger proper cleanup of pending operations

file_operations.description: Add 30-second timeout handlers to all mutations (addAudioPost, listenToAudioPost, removeAudioPost, addToFavorites, removeFromFavorites) with user-friendly timeout error messages and actionable guidance
Add 30-second timeout handler to getFavoritePosts query with timeout error message
Add 30-second timeout handler to getKidFriendlyPosts query with timeout error message
Add 30-second timeout handlers to getMyContent query and edit/delete mutations with timeout error messages
Add 30-second timeout handler to getUserStatistics query with timeout error message
Add 30-second timeout handler to audio replies query with timeout error message

requirements.summary: Wrap all async route components in React Suspense boundaries with mobile-optimized loading states
acceptanceCriteria: Each route has a Suspense boundary with fallback UI
Loading states are optimized for mobile screen sizes
Skeleton screens or spinners display during code splitting loads
Loading states do not block user interaction unnecessarily

file_operations.description: Wrap all route components in React Suspense boundaries with mobile-optimized loading fallback UI (skeleton screens or spinners) ensuring graceful loading on slower mobile connections
Create mobile-optimized loading fallback component with skeleton screen or spinner that displays during route code splitting loads

requirements.summary: Implement code splitting for all route components using React.lazy() to reduce initial bundle size
acceptanceCriteria: Each major route is lazy-loaded as a separate chunk
Initial bundle size is reduced compared to current build
Route transitions load smoothly without blocking
Build output shows multiple chunk files

file_operations.description: Convert all route component imports to use React.lazy() for code splitting: FeedPage, ExplorePage, UploadPage, DashboardPage, OnboardingPage, AboutPage, ContactPage, HelpPage, TermsPage, PrivacyPage, AuthPage

requirements.summary: Add lazy loading to all images using native loading attribute, prioritizing above-the-fold images
acceptanceCriteria: All below-the-fold images use loading='lazy'
Critical above-the-fold images use loading='eager'
Images load progressively as user scrolls
Bandwidth usage is reduced on mobile connections

file_operations.description: Add loading='lazy' attribute to cover images in AudioCard components to optimize bandwidth usage on mobile
Add loading prop support to ProceduralCover component, defaulting to 'lazy' for below-the-fold images
Add loading='eager' attribute to header banner image since it's above-the-fold
Add loading='lazy' attribute to category card images to optimize bandwidth

requirements.summary: Implement debounced scroll and input handlers (300ms delay) to reduce CPU usage on mobile
acceptanceCriteria: Search input is debounced by 300ms
Scroll handlers are debounced to reduce event frequency
Mobile scrolling remains smooth without jank
CPU usage is reduced during rapid interactions

file_operations.description: Implement 300ms debouncing on search input handler to reduce CPU usage and query frequency on mobile devices
Create reusable debounce hook for input and scroll handlers with configurable delay (default 300ms)

requirements.summary: Add proper cleanup and memory leak prevention to PlayerProvider context
acceptanceCriteria: Audio elements are properly cleaned up on unmount
Event listeners are removed when components unmount
No memory leaks occur during prolonged mobile usage
Audio context is properly closed when not in use

file_operations.description: Add comprehensive cleanup logic in useEffect return functions to dispose audio elements, remove event listeners, and close audio context on unmount to prevent memory leaks on mobile devices with limited RAM

requirements.summary: Replace infinite loading spinner with fallback error UI that appears after 15 seconds with recovery options
acceptanceCriteria: Loading spinner displays for maximum 15 seconds
Error UI appears if app fails to initialize within 15 seconds
Error message includes network connectivity status
Users can reload, clear cache, or check connection from error UI
Error screen is readable and functional on mobile devices

file_operations.description: Add JavaScript timeout logic that replaces loading spinner with fallback error UI after 15 seconds, displaying specific error messages, network status check, and actionable recovery options (reload, clear cache, check connection) optimized for mobile screens

requirements.summary: Add graceful degradation fallbacks allowing core features to function even if certain features fail
acceptanceCriteria: Feed page loads even if favorites query fails
Explore page functions if some category data fails to load
Failed features display inline error messages
Core navigation and browsing remain functional
Users can access available content despite partial failures

file_operations.description: Implement graceful degradation so feed displays audio items even if favorites query fails, showing inline error message for failed features while keeping core browsing functional
Implement graceful degradation so explore page displays available categories even if some data fails to load, showing inline error messages for failed sections
Implement graceful degradation so dashboard displays available sections even if statistics or content queries fail, showing inline error messages for failed sections

requirements.summary: Optimize CSS for mobile-first rendering with touch interaction utilities and unused CSS removal
acceptanceCriteria: Mobile-first CSS utilities are available for all components
Active states provide clear visual feedback on touch
Tap highlight colors are defined for interactive elements
Unused CSS is removed to reduce file size

file_operations.description: Add mobile-specific utility classes for touch interactions including active states, tap highlights, and touch feedback. Ensure styles render efficiently on mobile browsers and remove unused CSS. Add -webkit-tap-highlight-color and custom active state utilities.
Configure Tailwind for mobile-first optimization by adding touch-specific utilities, optimizing purge settings to remove unused CSS, and ensuring mobile-first breakpoints are properly configured

requirements.summary: Add comprehensive try-catch blocks with detailed error logging to all async operations in useActor hook
acceptanceCriteria: All async actor operations are wrapped in try-catch
Actor initialization failures are logged with full details
Canister communication errors are caught and logged
Authentication errors display helpful messages
Error logs include timestamps and context

file_operations.description: Add comprehensive try-catch blocks around all async actor operations with detailed error logging capturing actor initialization failures, canister communication errors, and authentication issues. Log errors to console with timestamps and actionable messages. Note: This file is marked immutable in constraints, so implement error handling in a way that preserves existing structure.

requirements.summary: Implement progressive enhancement in AudioCard so basic playback works even if advanced features fail
acceptanceCriteria: Audio playback functions independently of other features
Failed favorite/reply features display inline errors
Users can still play audio if mutations fail
Core functionality remains accessible on feature failures

file_operations.description: Implement progressive enhancement so basic audio playback works independently even if favorites or replies features fail to load, displaying inline error messages for failed features while keeping playback functional

requirements.summary: Add mobile-specific touch event handlers with proper feedback and default behavior prevention
acceptanceCriteria: All interactive elements respond to touch events
Touch feedback is visible and immediate
Default browser behaviors are prevented where appropriate
No conflicts between touch and click handlers
Touch interactions feel native and responsive

file_operations.description: Add mobile-specific touch event handlers (onTouchStart, onTouchEnd) to buttons and interactive elements with visual feedback (active states, ripple effects) and appropriate preventDefault calls
Add touch event handlers to playback controls and slider with proper feedback and preventDefault for native-feeling interactions
Add touch event handlers to navigation buttons with visual feedback and appropriate default behavior prevention
Create reusable hook for managing touch event handlers, visual feedback states, and preventDefault logic for mobile touch interactions

requirements.summary: Optimize React Query cache configuration for mobile with reduced cache time and retry logic
acceptanceCriteria: Query cache times are optimized for mobile
Stale queries refetch at appropriate intervals
Failed queries retry with exponential backoff
Cache doesn't consume excessive mobile device memory

file_operations.description: Optimize QueryClient configuration for mobile devices by reducing cache time (cacheTime), setting appropriate staleTime for mobile connections, implementing retry logic with exponential backoff, and limiting memory usage. Note: This file is marked immutable in constraints, so implement configuration in a way that preserves existing structure.

requirements.summary: Add performance monitoring logging tracking key metrics on mobile devices
acceptanceCriteria: Time to interactive is logged to console
Initial load time is measured and logged
Memory usage is tracked during app lifecycle
Performance metrics are mobile-specific
Logs help identify performance bottlenecks

file_operations.description: Add performance monitoring that tracks and logs key metrics (time to interactive, initial load time, bundle size, memory usage) to console on mobile devices to help identify bottlenecks. Note: This file is marked immutable in constraints, so implement monitoring in a way that preserves existing structure.
Create hook that tracks performance metrics using Performance API and memory usage tracking, logging mobile-specific metrics to console with timestamps

requirements.summary: Implement proper error recovery in Internet Identity authentication with mobile-optimized messages
acceptanceCriteria: Authentication errors display mobile-friendly messages
Transient failures trigger automatic retry
Users receive clear guidance on fixing auth issues
Error states don't block the entire application
Authentication flow degrades gracefully on mobile

file_operations.description: Add comprehensive error recovery to authentication flow with mobile-optimized error messages, automatic retry on transient failures, clear guidance for authentication errors, and graceful degradation on mobile devices. Note: This file is marked immutable in constraints, so implement error handling in a way that preserves existing structure.
